content: Phase 1: Core POC - Test OpenAI conversation flow for booking extraction
Phase 1: Create Node.js test script with OpenAI integration using Emergent LLM Key
Phase 1: Test conversation flow extracting booking details (dates, room, guest info, crypto)
Phase 1: Test non-refundable policy flow and acknowledgment
Phase 1: Test QR code generation for crypto wallets
Phase 1: Test notification system (console log + Telegram)
Phase 1: Verify all POC user stories work end-to-end
Phase 2: Set up Node.js/Express backend structure
Phase 2: Implement MongoDB models (Hotel, Room, BookingStat)
Phase 2: Implement authentication endpoints (register, login, JWT)
Phase 2: Implement hotel owner dashboard APIs
Phase 2: Implement public widget APIs (config, chat, book)
Phase 2: Build React dashboard for hotel owners
Phase 2: Integrate OpenAI conversation flow from POC
Phase 2: All user stories covered in Development and testing
Phase 2: End to End Testing using Testing Agent
